EmailTemplate.description: Confirmation of an overcharge and subsequent refund.
EmailTemplate.name: Refund Due
EmailTemplate.subject: Contractor Insurance Refund
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Our internal processes have identified that you were overcharged for your insurance policy.
A refund of £XXXX will be returned to your account within 3-5 working days.
Apologies for any inconvenience caused and, if you have any questions, please do not hesitate to get in contact on 01242 808740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
